content.en:
After returning to the Dao Mountain Realm, Ye Tian's body came to greet his copy body for the first time, and then released the copy body for the first time, after all, the appearance of the Dead Universe Holy Son was not suitable for appearing in the Dao Mountain Realm.

The forbidden world, the human world.

Ye Tian's body came back with the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, and then began to refine the Creation Mixed Yuan Well again.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai re-refined the Creation Mixed Yuan Well.

He is ready to fuse the Creation Mixed Yuan Well with the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, once fused, the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm will inevitably break the limit of the Forbidden Realm and be promoted to another level.

But in this way, the value of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm is completely different.

Although the human race now occupies a lot of territory in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, it is actually not very much.

If you are promoted to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, it will be cheaper for other forces!

Of course, he will not destroy other forces.

this day.

Ye Tian summoned many of the power lords of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, including the Black Wind Mountain Lord.

His purpose in opening this meeting was very simple, that is, to buy the territory of other forces in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, and completely control the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm in the hands of the human race.

------------------------

meeting.

A Famous Domain Ancestor or a Half-Step Domain Ancestor appeared here, curious about why Ye Tian started such a meeting.

Soon, Ye Tian came.

"I've seen the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

"I've seen the Alliance Leader!"

One by one, the half-step domain ancestor and the domain ancestor said respectfully.

Ye Tian said directly: "This opening meeting is very simple, I want to buy the territory of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm from the major forces, please open up a base in other places in the Daoshan Realm." "

As soon as these words came out, many people changed color.

A domain ancestor spoke: "Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, are you trying to drive us away?"

"This is purely voluntary, as long as you are willing to leave, I am willing to give enough rewards, and even the Holy Body Inheritance and the corresponding cultivation treasures, I can also take it out!"

Ye Tian said.

Eucharistic Heritage!

When many half-step domain ancestors heard this, they were immediately moved, and even some domain ancestors were very excited.

They basically knew now that if they didn't have the Eucharistic Inheritance, they would basically not be able to advance to the Supreme Domain Ancestor level.

Of course, practicing the Holy Body only means that there is a chance to become a Supreme Domain Ancestor, and it does not mean that you can break through 100%.

But with the Eucharistic inheritance, there is hope!

Who doesn't want the Eucharist?

Some of the top domain ancestors in the Daoshan Realm also have holy bodies themselves, and the top domain ancestors who do not have holy bodies have now obtained the Holy Body Inheritance from the Battle Realm Tower, but all they have obtained are relatively rubbish Holy Body Inheritance, which is not of much help to the Powerful Domain Ancestors.

Moreover, only the half-step Domain Ancestor level can cultivate the Holy Body, and once it breaks through to the Domain Ancestor level, the Domain Body is frozen, and it is difficult to cultivate the Holy Body again.

Unless it is a treasure such as the Void Holy Fruit, it can forcibly reverse the domain body and form the Void Holy Body.

And a treasure like the Void Holy Fruit, where is the treasure that these top domain ancestors can obtain!

Therefore, now that many of the top domain ancestors in the Daoshan Realm do not have the Holy Body, they have no way to break through with the help of the Holy Body, and they can only pass on the Holy Body inheritance to their descendants or valued disciples.

Therefore, the half-step Domain Ancestors naturally wanted to obtain the Sacred Body Inheritance before they were promoted to the Domain Ancestors, but it was too difficult for them to obtain the Sacred Body Inheritance.

Now, Ye Tian said that he could give them the inheritance of the Holy Body, which is a great opportunity that is difficult to find!

Immediately, a half-step domain ancestor represented his own power and expressed his willingness to give the territory where he was located to the human race, and only needed the Holy Body Inheritance and some resources.

In their opinion, where do these small forces dare to resist the human race, they are a group of ants to Ye Tian, that bit of territory in exchange for the Holy Body Inheritance, even if they can't practice, if the force they are in gives birth to a genius, then there is hope to be promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

So, such a deal is a good deal.

Subsequently.

A half-step domain ancestor signed a law agreement on the spot and agreed to such a deal.

And Ye Tian also passed on the ordinary holy body of a gate to them at the beginning, and the value of these holy body inheritances in the battle gate is not high, and with his status, he can naturally exchange a lot.

When these half-step domain ancestors obtained the Holy Body Inheritance and some resources, they immediately went back and prepared to withdraw from the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

After all, those resources were enough for them to impact the Domain Ancestor level, and even cultivate a few Domain Ancestors.

Moreover, withdrawing from the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm does not mean that they cannot return to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, they can still enter the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm to find resources and treasures, but the territory is under the management of the human race, and they cannot establish a sect power in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, and they cannot declare the sovereignty of the territory.

Strictly speaking, they did not lose much, but the benefits gained were too great.

Most of the forces in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm are small forces, but there are too few forces with domain ancestors.

Black Wind Mountain is one, and the first batch of those domain ancestors to enter the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm are the forces.

"Alliance leader, can you really mention any conditions?"

A domain ancestor asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Battle Realm Tower, 1 million points, if it is given to me, I will immediately lead my sect out of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm!"

This domain ancestor spoke.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

1 million points is also an astronomical amount for an ordinary domain ancestor, but for a domain ancestor like him, it is nothing at all, and even the unification realm of some holy lands can take out 1 million points.

It can only be said that this Yu Ancestor is too poor, otherwise he would dare to offer a price of 10 million points, and Ye Tian may agree.

Seeing that Ye Tian agreed, that domain ancestor was excited.

1,000,000 points is enough to exchange for multiple holy body inheritances in the Battle Realm Tower, and he can also exchange for many resources and treasures that are of great help to his cultivation!

"Alliance leader, I also want 1 million points!"

Another Domain Ancestor spoke.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed one by one.

Soon after, he signed an agreement with all these domain ancestors, and took them into the Battle Boundary Tower on the spot, transferring them 1 million points.

Half a month later.

This meeting is coming to an end, and only Black Wind Mountain remains.

Ye Tian is also the domain ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, and letting Black Wind Mountain move its headquarters and give up the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm naturally requires more costs.

After all, Black Wind Mountain occupies more territory than the Terran Race, and without enough price, Black Wind Mountain will naturally not be stupid enough to give up the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

"Alliance leader, you and I are both members of the Black Wind Mountain, if the Black Wind Mountain gives up the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, my price will be very high!"

The Black Wind Mountain Lord reminded.

"Lord of Black Wind Mountain, you just mention it!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Black Wind Mountain Lord pondered for a moment and said, "I need a treasure that can help me break through to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and I also need an ancestral medicine, 1,000 holy medicines, three holy body inheritances, twenty domain techniques, and resources worth 10 million Battle Realm Tower points!"

He was a lion who opened his mouth, and he thought that Ye Tian would bargain.

However, Ye Tian directly agreed: "Yes, I agreed!"
